summary: Preflight makes the original representative #45536 obsolete: it is already closed unmerged. The live line-clamp canonical path is open issue #45020 plus focused open PR #45114. The exec-approval modal PRs in this cluster are a separate related CSS overflow subfamily and are already closed as implemented on main, with merged #67082 as hydrated evidence. No close, merge, or fix action is planned.
